/.title: Recollect - Memory Preservation
/.description: A photo journaling app to preserve, organize, and share memories with close friends and family through private, customizable photo albums and journaling features.
h2: The Meaningful & Private Wayto Preserve Memories
h3: Do you have 4,000+ photos on your phone?
p: Recollect
Home
Why we are super cool
Join the Waitlist
Join +50 others.
Of course you do. Everyone does. But let’s be honest—you don’t even know what’s in there.
🔹 Duplicates of the same sunset🔹 Screenshots of things you swore you’d read later🔹 That weird blurry photo from a night out in 2019
Your camera roll is a black hole. And let’s be real—Google Photos isn’t helping. It just dumps everything into one place and calls it "storage."
So we made Recollect.
Not a social media app. Not a cluttered cloud. Just a clean, organized, deliberate way to keep your best memories alive.

✅ Take fewer, better photos. No spam, no junk, just real moments.✅ Wait to see them. Because delayed gratification actually makes them more meaningful.✅ Keep them organized, effortlessly. Albums. Groups. Calendar view. All without the mess.✅ Share, but only with who you want. No random followers. No "like" hunting. No noise.
Why are we super cool?
Because we don’t believe in hoarding memories—we believe in cherishing them.
Because we don’t make you scroll forever—we help you remember forever.
Because your life is more than a feed.
And if that’s something you believe in, join us.
Save Your Memories
We believe memories are more than just photos—they’re stories, emotions, and experiences. Recollect is designed to help you preserve them authentically with tools that keep your moments meaningful.
No Vanity Metrics: No likes, no followers—just real moments.
Photo Journaling: Add captions, audio, and reflections.
Delayed Gratification: Photos develop after 24-48 hours to help you reflect and appreciate.
Recollect isn’t just about taking photos—it’s about cherishing them. We provide tools to help you revisit your life’s best moments.
Unlimited Storage: Save all your moments without worrying about space.
Collaborative Albums: Build shared albums with friends and family.
Digital Photo Wall: Your personal space for life’s milestones and adventures.
At Recollect, we’re all about putting you in control of your moments. Keep them private, share with friends, or print your favorites—it’s your choice.
Custom Privacy Controls: Decide who sees what.
A Journaling Experience: Combine visuals and storytelling to create something truly personal.
Multi Device Access: We are working on making it accessible from your computer.
Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
Yes, you can cancel your Recollect Premium subscription at any time. There are no long-term commitments, and you can continue to enjoy the benefits until the end of your billing cycle.
Is there a free trial available?
Yes, we offer a 30-day free trial for new users. Experience all the benefits of Recollect Premium before deciding to subscribe.
Can I download my photos?
Yes! We let you download all your photos if you wish to your devices.
Can I share my photos with others?
Recollect has design collaborative albums to allocate all the best photos in one place. You can make as many albums as you wish.
